question_text: A charged object creates an electric field around itself. Which statement best describes what an electric field is?

options.label: A
options.text: The area around a charged object where another charge would experience a force

options.label: B
options.text: A region that only contains positive charges

options.label: C
options.text: The movement of electrons through a conductor

options.label: D
options.text: The total amount of charge stored on an object

explanation: An electric field is the region of space around a charged object where another charge would experience a force (attraction or repulsion). Field lines show the direction a positive charge would be pushed.
